summary.en: A practical library of experiments for reducing desirability, feasibility, and viability risk before teams overbuild a product or business model.
summary.zh: 一本面向商业实验的实践手册，帮助团队在过度投入之前，用实验降低需求性、可行性和可营性风险。

recommendation.en: Use this as the operating manual for Experiment Canvas and innovation metrics: it explains how to choose evidence, define pass/fail criteria, and learn fast.
recommendation.zh: 它是实验画布和创新指标的操作手册：帮助你选择证据、定义通过/失败标准，并让团队更快学习。

sources.label: David J. Bland & Alexander Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019
Strategyzer · Testing Business Ideas book page

headline.en: Choose experiments that turn assumptions into evidence
headline.zh: 选择实验，把假设转成证据

whyOpen.en: Open this when a canvas is full of guesses. It helps you name the riskiest assumptions, choose experiments, and interpret evidence quality.
whyOpen.zh: 当画布上充满猜测时打开这本：它帮助你识别最高风险假设、选择实验，并判断证据质量。

audience.en: Product teams, founders, growth teams, and innovation teams preparing to test before scaling.
audience.zh: 适合准备在规模化前验证的产品团队、创业者、增长团队和创新团队。

commonMisreads.en: An experiment is not useful because it is clever; it is useful when it reduces the right risk.
commonMisreads.zh: 实验有价值不是因为设计巧妙，而是因为它降低了正确的风险。

firstSteps.en: Mark the riskiest canvas assumptions before choosing an experiment.
firstSteps.zh: 先标出画布上风险最高的假设，再选择实验。

firstSteps.en: Use evidence strength to avoid treating weak signals as validation.
firstSteps.zh: 用证据强度避免把弱信号当成验证成功。

outcomes.en: You can choose a next experiment and define what evidence would make you pivot, persevere, or stop.
outcomes.zh: 你能选择下一步实验，并定义什么证据会让你转向、继续或停止。

practicePrompts.en: What is the cheapest experiment that can disprove your riskiest assumption this week?
practicePrompts.zh: 本周能推翻最高风险假设的最低成本实验是什么？
